summary: Iteration 2 testing PASSED for Portimão'26 app. Backend: 6/6 pytest cases passed (tickets w/ Rede Expressos R6LJC56/R6LJC5N + qr_url, emergency 9 items w/ 112 danger + hospital lat/lng, trip-stats w/ phase+budget+checklist+shopping, itinerary Day1 15:15 Rede Expressos and Day4 13:10 R6LJC5N, briefings, root health). Frontend: onboarding shows on first visit with 3 slides+dots+Saltar+Continuar, sets onboarding_done_v1=true and does not re-show. Home displays 3-card stats dashboard, 'Rede Expressos • Sete Rios → Portimão 15:15 • Lugares 50-53' next-card, Bilhetes + Emergências in quick actions. Tickets screen shows 4 cards with operator badge, perforation, Mostrar QR, QR modal with quickchart.io image + reservation + code. Emergency screen shows big red 112 card w/ 'GRATUITO • 24H • UE', Saúde section (SNS 24/Hospital w/ map btn/Farmácia), Segurança section. Explorar hub includes hub-tickets and hub-emergencia. Deprecation warnings detected: 'shadow*' style props (React Native web) and props.pointerEvents.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — appears across screens. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (shadows.soft/medium)

Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — likely coming from Animated.View/Modal children. Reference: check /app/frontend/app/tickets.tsx Modal + Animated.View wrappers

'[Reanimated] Property [transform] may be overwritten by a layout animation. Please wrap your component with an animated view and apply the layout animation on the wrapper.' — occurs in onboarding OnbSlide (FadeInUp + floatStyle transform on same view). Reference: /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx:166 (iconBig)

action_items: (low) Migrate theme shadow objects (shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset) to boxShadow strings for React Native Web to silence deprecation warnings.
(low) Wrap floating transform animation in Onboarding with an extra Animated.View to avoid overwriting the FadeInUp layout transform.
(low) Replace any lingering props.pointerEvents with style={{ pointerEvents: '...' }}.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py starting to grow (>1000 lines). Consider splitting endpoints into routers (tickets, briefings, bus, weather, chat) in a future iteration.
Emergency 'hospital-contact' phone '351282400000' has 12 digits — consider formatting as '+351282400000' for tel: consistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in /app/frontend/.env. All Sprint-2 endpoints (/api/tickets, /api/emergency, /api/trip-stats, updated /api/itinerary) verified. Onboarding gate uses storage util key 'onboarding_done_v1' in localStorage on web. To retrigger onboarding, clear localStorage and reload.
